name: node-globby
title: node-globby
description:
Extends glob with promise API
Extends glob with support for multiple patterns and exposes a Promise API.
.
Related projects includes multimatch which can match against a list instead of
the filesystem and then glob-stream which is a streaming alternative finally
matcher is simple wildcard matching.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-globby because Extends glob with promise API.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-globby as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-globby with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-globby --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
